eligible_applicant_type: Faculty at DE-INBRE partner institutions (University of Delaware, Delaware State University, Christiana Care Health System, Nemours Children’s Hospital, Delaware Technical Community College)
Faculty at DE-INBRE affiliate institutions (Wilmington VA Medical Center, Delaware Public Health Laboratory, Delaware Health Information Network, Delaware Biosciences Association)
Independent investigators (excluding graduate students, clinical fellows, and post-doctoral scholars)
project_area: Biomedical research aligned with NIH goals, including pilot projects, feasibility studies, and data science initiatives using Delaware-based biomedical databases
demographic_requirements: Investigators must engage undergraduate students in research projects as part of the funded work. Early-stage and new investigators are prioritized for certain award types.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants are independent investigators employed by DE-INBRE partner or affiliate institutions. Graduate students, clinical fellows, and post-doctoral scholars are ineligible. Applicants must devote at least 25% of their professional effort (3.0 person months) to research and career development. Investigators with active IDeA mechanism funding are ineligible for simultaneous DE-INBRE Pilot Project funding.
